title: deer-flow.stack-tuner.stage.done v1
description: A stack-tuner stage has finished. Carries token / cost / verdict for the stage. Per-cycle aggregate appears later in cycle.done; this event lets consumers stream stage-by-stage instead of waiting for the cycle to close. Compact form (source=/deer-flow) carries only cycle_id+stage+ok; full form (source=/deer-flow/stack-tuner) adds model + cost/score/error detail.

rejection_reasons.description: machine-readable reasons the stage's output was rejected (e.g. answer_len=186<200)
